name: Sunny Vegetable Combo
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons toasted sunflower seeds or sliced almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from pea pods; wash and place in a 1-quart glass casserole.
2. Wash asparagus and break into 1-inch pieces, discarding the tough portion of the stalk.
3. Add asparagus to pea pods along with butter. Cover with casserole lid.
4. Microwave on HIGH for 5-6 minutes, or until almost tender.
5. Add cornstarch; mix until blended. Cover.
6. Microwave on HIGH for 1-1 1/2 minutes, or until vegetables reach desired doneness.
7. Sprinkle with sunflower seeds. Serves 4-5.
TIPS: One 6-ounce package of frozen pea pods and one 10-ounce package of cut asparagus can be substituted for fresh. Increase the initial cooking time to 8-9 minutes.
